title: Simply Technically
description: Simply Technically is a simple yet fun modpack based on technical mods.
body:
SIMPLY TECHNICALLY: A Fabric Tech Adventure

Get ready to embrace the technical side of Minecraft with SIMPLY TECHNICALLY! This thoughtfully curated modpack offers an engaging blend of technology and exploration for Minecraft Fabric 1.20.4.

Key Features

  • Immersive Technology: Master machines and automation with essential tech mods like Ad Astra, Alloy Forgery, and the beloved Tech Reborn.
  • Enhanced Exploration: Discover breathtaking worlds transformed by Terralith, Better Nether, and Better End, offering new biomes and challenges.
  • Over 70 Mods: Dive into a rich collection of 70 carefully selected mods to expand your technical and exploratory horizons.

Dive into a world of innovation – download SIMPLY TECHNICALLY today!

Visit my website
